---
title: "Agent-Based Models in R"
short-title: "Agent-Based Models"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "The ODD protocol, existing R frameworks, and building custom ABMs."
keywords: ["agent-based model", "ABM", "ODD protocol", "simulation"]
---

# Agent-Based Models {#sec-agent-based-models}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
